nasb.text: They went to the entrance of Gedor, even to the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks.

esv.text: They journeyed to the entrance of Gedor, to the east side of the valley, to seek pasture for their flocks,

cnv.text: 他們往基多的關口去，直到山谷的東面，為自己的羊群尋找草場。

ccb.text: 他们前往平原东边的基多谷寻找牧羊的草场，
